prompt:
Resume:
[Name Redacted]
Email: [redacted] | Phone: [redacted]

SUMMARY
Information Systems undergraduate with hands-on full-stack web development experience building applications for underrepresented users. Seeking a summer fintech internship to apply Python, SQL, and web development skills.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: Python (Intermediate), JavaScript, SQL, HTML, CSS | Databases: SQLite, MongoDB
Tools: AWS, Microsoft Excel

EDUCATION
Singapore Management University – BSc Information Systems

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Software Developer (Industrial Attachment) – HuONE | November 2023
- Led a team to develop a production web application, delegating tasks strategically to maximize team efficiency.
- Tackled AI integration challenges by identifying technical constraints early and proposing viable alternative solutions.

CSIT Computing Scholar – Centre for Strategic Infocomm Technologies | Nov–Dec 2023
- Gained exposure to cybersecurity, data analytics, cloud infrastructure, and software development.

KEY PROJECTS
ScamBarrier – Web application to protect elderly users from message scams
- Built a web interface and backend to analyze and classify suspicious messages.
- Optimized UX for a non-technical audience with clear, accessible flows.

LEADERSHIP
PyLadies Co-Chair & Social Media Head | PyCon 2025 Organising Committee
- Co-led community outreach and conducted an Introduction to Python workshop with NTU, reaching 50+ female participants.

prompt:
Role: Junior Software Engineer

- Applications Development (SkillsFuture Proficiency Level: 3) [suggested: Essential]
- Software Testing (SkillsFuture Proficiency Level: 3) [suggested: Essential]
- Software Design (SkillsFuture Proficiency Level: 2) [suggested: Important]
- Data Management (SkillsFuture Proficiency Level: 2) [suggested: Important]
- Stakeholder Management (SkillsFuture Proficiency Level: 1) [suggested: Nice-to-have]
- Project Management (SkillsFuture Proficiency Level: 1) [suggested: Nice-to-have]
response: {"tiered_skills": [{"name": "Applications Development", "tier": "Essential", "reasoning": "Core execution skill for a Junior Software Engineer — hiring managers expect this on Day 1."}, {"name": "Software Testing", "tier": "Essential", "reasoning": "Required at proficiency level 3; directly tied to code quality which is a Day 1 expectation."}, {"name": "Software Design", "tier": "Important", "reasoning": "Strong differentiator at junior level; needed quickly to contribute meaningfully to architecture discussions."}, {"name": "Data Management", "tier": "Important", "reasoning": "Preferred in most SWE job postings; unlocks real impact once onboarded."}, {"name": "Stakeholder Management", "tier": "Nice-to-have", "reasoning": "Helpful but learnable on the job; more critical at senior levels."}, {"name": "Project Management", "tier": "Nice-to-have", "reasoning": "Supporting competency at junior level; typically developed over time."}]}

prompt:

- Software Design (tier: Important)

- Project Management (tier: Nice-to-have)
